api/engine.d.ts: GENERATED artifact (ts/codegen/manifest.ts + tools/codegen_bootstrap, drift-gated byte-for-byte against both generators) — one section per registered CLI verb/class/event, so it grows monotonically as the engine does; m1-scene-format's new `scene` verb pushed it from 488 to 501 lines.
